title: selaginella spanielema
intro: Selaginella spanielema, also known as Spike Moss, is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, belonging to the order Selaginellales. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spike Moss include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Selaginella spanielema typically involve drying and processing the plant material to make teas, tinctures, or capsules that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
